fields.Background\n:
Birthplace: New Orleans, Louisiana
Family: Adopted by deaf parents, which led her to learn American Sign Language (ASL) as her first language. She also has an adoptive brother, Luca Sciuto, and a biological brother, Kyle Davis      
Childhood: Moved frequently across the southern U.S., gaining a broad cultural understanding.
Work:
fields.Strengths\n:
Analyzing forensic evidence like DNA, fingerprints, and ballistics
Running toxicology reports and chemical analyses
Using cutting-edge tech to solve crimes
Collaborating closely with field agents, especially Gibb
fields.Weaknesses\n: Childish, Emotional depending on others, dosen´t like changes and is overconfident.
